subcodes.title: Words to E.J. Rosenberg et al, spoken around Feb. 1901
subcodes.first_line: Jesus Christ had two bodies - one spiritual and one material. The material body is of no importance. It changes and changes always.
subcodes.subjects: @resurrection of Christ, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @reincarnation, @Mary Magdalene
